purpose: Thin per-deposit INDEX into the recovered external metadata for this deposit's legacy Zenodo DOIs. The actual records live in the bulk data stores under data/ (openalex-severed-recovery.json, zenodo-xml-pretermination-2026-06-07.tar.gz, datacite-full-backup.json, datacite-survivors-multi-heteronym.json). Sidecars do not duplicate those records — they map each covered DOI to its identifier in each store.

10.5281/zenodo.18141735.title: The Meaning Economy Is Now Possible: Why LLMs Change Everything About Value — Crimson Hexagon Archive

10.5281/zenodo.18142049.title: Infrastructural-Cognitive Praxis: A Theory of Upstream Intervention

10.5281/zenodo.18147346.title: Semantic Economy Probes: A Diagnostic Toolkit Methods for Detecting Semantic Liquidation in AI Systems, Institutions, and Ideologies

10.5281/zenodo.18135985.title: Provenance Documentation: SEM-PROBE-2025-12 — Crimson Hexagon Archive

10.5281/zenodo.18146859.title: Retrocausal Canon Formation and the Political Economy of the Past How Semantic Rent is Extracted from Retroactively Constructed History

10.5281/zenodo.18146840.title: The Twenty-Dollar Loop: Documentation of a Semantic Trend (2026-2027)

openalex.lookup: records[].doi == this DOI; openalex_id is the W-prefixed OpenAlex Work ID

zenodo_bulk_xml.lookup: extract <record_id>.xml from the tarball where record_id is the digits after 'zenodo.'

datacite_survivor_sweep.lookup: search records[].attributes.doi == this DOI across orcid_records, name_records, sigil_records, vox_records, feist_records
